title: FilePathAttribute
description: FilePathAttribute: Path to a file in the client's file system.

FileExtensions.description: Collection of file extensions allowed for a member this attribute corresponds to. Any extension is allowed if null or empty.

Name.description: Name of the method parameter this attribute corresponds to (not relevant in case of object properties).

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
